title:
Letters → Feelings → Wait for Me,
Okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm heading to the track to tidy up
after today's training session...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thanks for training with me today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's my pleasure, Suzuka. I know you
have a race coming up, so I'd love to
help you in any way I can!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's been a while since I've heard you sing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I better make sure I grab a good
seat!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Spe. Can I ask you what you think
of your fans?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh, my fans?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I think that since they're
rooting for me, I've really gotta make
sure I do the best I can!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They make me want to push myself to be
faster. I hope they'll always be cheering
for me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. Not sure if that makes sense or
not.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... So, they're people who you
really rely on, then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's it! I wouldn't be here
without them!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...So, what do your fans mean to you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do they mean to me? Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
They're the ones waiting to see me sing,
and run... and win.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's why they're important to me... I
guess?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Someone who waits for you, huh?
That sounds absolutely wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And, of course, I'm waiting for you too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but aren't we rivals?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but I'm your fan too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Goodness... But, thanks.
